rankedTasks.title: Implement real server-ownership check in OwnerGuard (remove return true stub)
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed: OWNER branch unconditionally returns true with a TODO. Every route behind OwnerGuard is open to any OWNER for any serverId. Single highest-leverage authz fix.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: serverModel.exists({_id:serverId,ownerId:user.id}) gates the OWNER branch; integration test asserts a non-owning OWNER gets 403.

rankedTasks.title: Add JwtAuthGuard + RolesGuard to the entire game-updates controller
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed: controller has no guards at all. Anyone can mark updates complete, reset build IDs, or inject latestBuildId for any server.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard,RolesGuard) at class level + per-route @Roles; unauthenticated call returns 401.

rankedTasks.title: Remove PayPal clientSecret from plaintext logs
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed line 31-33: live clientSecret logged to file on every createOrder/captureOrder. Credential disclosure to disk.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: resolveCredentials logs only presence (OK/MISSING); grep of log output never contains the secret value.

rankedTasks.title: Sanitize playerName/guildName before RCON sql interpolation in giveLeadGuild
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed lines 1432-1457: five raw SQL strings interpolate request-body names; reaches the live Conan SQLite DB. Allowlist is trivial since game names need no SQL meta-chars.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Reject/escape chars outside [A-Za-z0-9 _-']; +@MaxLength(64) on DTO; a name with ") OR 1=1-- is rejected with 400.

rankedTasks.title: Strip @Public from DDoS player self-whitelist and add secret check to vps/threat
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed @Public on whitelist/player/:gameAccountId/:serverId and vps/threat. Unauthenticated caller can whitelist any player's real IP into the firewall.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Remove @Public from whitelist; gate vps/threat with HMAC/shared-secret header; unauthenticated whitelist call returns 401/403.

rankedTasks.title: Derive isStaff server-side on ticket message POST instead of trusting DTO
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed: isStaff: sendMessageDto.isStaff || false trusts client flag; a non-staff user can forge staff messages and SLA credit.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: isStaff derived from CurrentUser role; whitelist pipe strips the incoming field; non-staff sending isStaff:true is recorded as false.

rankedTasks.title: Add server-ownership guard to server-roles create/update/delete
rankedTasks.rationale: Only JwtAuthGuard protects role CRUD; any user can create/modify/delete roles on servers they don't own via arbitrary serverId/roleId.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: POST verifies dto.serverId ownership; PATCH/DELETE load role then assert ownership; non-owner rejection covered by test.

rankedTasks.title: Add server-ownership guard to permission-templates CRUD + duplicate
rankedTasks.rationale: All mutations require only JwtAuthGuard; cross-tenant create/delete by ID; duplicate trusts a raw userId from the body.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Ownership asserted on serverId/template.serverId; duplicate derives userId from CurrentUser; non-owner gets 403.

rankedTasks.title: Restrict protection raid-violation endpoint to OWNER/ADMIN and add typed DTO
rankedTasks.rationale: PLAYER role + body:any lets any player forge a violation that teleports a rival clan to prison via RCON.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: @Roles drops PLAYER; violationDto is a validated class; a PLAYER call returns 403.

rankedTasks.title: Issue admin-invitation tokens via authService.generateTokensForUser (fix manual JwtService + duplicate refresh_token)
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed lines 413-414 hand-roll JwtService (no expiry, fat payload) and the controller returns access_token in the refresh_token slot. One fix resolves both.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: acceptInvitationWithNewAccount returns {access_token,refresh_token} from generateTokensForUser; cookies set via setAuthCookies; manual require removed; token has exp.

rankedTasks.title: Handle Stripe subscription.updated/payment_failed to downgrade plan on failed renewal
rankedTasks.rationale: Confirmed only checkout.completed + subscription.deleted are handled; a past_due/unpaid sub keeps plan=pro indefinitely. Direct revenue-integrity bug.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: customer.subscription.updated with status past_due/unpaid flips plan to free; unit test stubs constructEvent and asserts the flip.

rankedTasks.title: Escape user input before MongoDB $regex in Discord validateCharacterExists (ReDoS)
rankedTasks.rationale: Raw modal text builds new RegExp('^'+name+'$') passed to Mongoose; crafted input causes catastrophic backtracking, stalling the query thread.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Input escaped (or collation index scan replaces regex); a (a+)+ style payload no longer stalls; covered by a unit test.

rankedTasks.title: Atomically claim pending admin-gifts before RCON dispatch to stop double-delivery
rankedTasks.rationale: dispatchPendingForPlayer fetches status=pending then iterates; a rapid reconnect during in-flight RCON re-fetches the same rows and double-delivers.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: findOneAndUpdate({status:'pending'},{status:'delivering'}) gates each gift; concurrent player.online test delivers exactly once.

rankedTasks.title: Fix findPublicServers online/offline filter that queries the dead Server.isOnline field
rankedTasks.rationale: Post-split isOnline is no longer stored on Server; ?status=online returns 0 results and ?status=offline matches all. Public listing is broken.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Status filter resolves via GameInstance ids ($in); ?status=online returns only live servers in an integration test.

rankedTasks.title: Add staff authorization check to ticket claim button
rankedTasks.rationale: handleClaimTicketButton skips isStaffMember() that every other sensitive button enforces; any channel member can claim/assign tickets.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: isStaffMember guard added at top mirroring handleRefundButton; non-staff interaction is rejected.

rankedTasks.title: Restrict GET /users and /users/:id to SUPERADMIN and paginate findAll
rankedTasks.rationale: OWNER role can enumerate every platform user and full collection scans with no limit. Tenant-isolation + DoS.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: @Roles SUPERADMIN only; findAll applies skip/limit; an OWNER call returns 403.

rankedTasks.title: Scope economy-events cleanup to caller's servers and drop OWNER access
rankedTasks.rationale: POST /cleanup runs an unscoped updateMany; any OWNER mass-deactivates events across all servers (cross-tenant + DoS).
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: updateMany scoped by serverId/ownership or endpoint becomes SUPERADMIN-only; an OWNER affecting another server is blocked.

rankedTasks.title: Add @Min/@Max bounds to economy-event amount
rankedTasks.rationale: amount has only @IsNumber; admin can mass-debit -999999 or mass-credit across every wallet on the server.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: @Min(0)+@Max(configurable) on Create/Update DTO; amount=-1 returns 400 in a test.

rankedTasks.title: Collapse heartbeat path to 2 DB queries (cache gameInstanceId, pass docs down)
rankedTasks.rationale: updateHeartbeat fires 4-6 sequential queries across two collections every 60s/agent via repeated writeRuntime/readRuntime re-fetches.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Server(select gameInstanceId)+GameInstance fetched once and passed down; heartbeat issues one select + one update, asserted by query spy.

rankedTasks.title: Convert light-sync per-player loops to one bulk read + one bulkWrite
rankedTasks.rationale: processLightSync issues 100-150 individual calls per cycle on a 50-player server (find-per-player + updateOne + conditional find).
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Single find({serverId,gameAccountId:{$in}}).lean() builds a map; bulkWrite applies updates; sync is 2 queries regardless of player count.

rankedTasks.title: Batch permission-template lookups in login/refresh/getMe (kill N+1)
rankedTasks.rationale: getResolvedPermissions/getResolvedTemplateName fire a findById per role; 10 roles = 20 extra queries every login.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Single find({_id:{$in:templateIds}}) before the loop; one template query per request in a test.

rankedTasks.title: Paginate economy-event processing instead of silently truncating at 1000 wallets
rankedTasks.rationale: ALL/ONLINE/CRITERIA paths call findByServer(1,1000); servers >1000 players silently skip the rest with no log; admins believe everyone was credited.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Loop/cursor processes all wallets with a warn above threshold; a 1500-wallet seed credits all 1500.

rankedTasks.title: Replace getServerBans JS active-filter with indexed query + batch admin lookup
rankedTasks.rationale: Loads every ban doc touching a server then filters isActive in JS and calls getAdminInfo per ban. Needs index + $in.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Add index {bannedServers:1,isCurrentlyBanned:1}; query by those fields; single findByIds for admins; no JS filter loop.

rankedTasks.title: Add indexes on config_discord (serverId unique, discordServerId)
rankedTasks.rationale: Schema declares no indexes; getConfig/findCachedByGuildId and every Discord button interaction scans the collection.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: index({serverId:1},{unique:true}) + index({discordServerId:1}) added; explain() shows IXSCAN.

rankedTasks.title: Use indexed gameAccountId instead of details.causerName regex in PlayerEventsService
rankedTasks.rationale: Every event query does a case-insensitive regex on an unindexed nested field = full scan; getEventsTimeline has no limit.
rankedTasks.acceptanceHint: Queries use causer/ownerGameAccountId with a (serverId,causerGameAccountId,timestamp) index; getEventsTimeline capped at 1000; explain() shows no COLLSCAN.
